creator: araujo@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi dear maintainer. 

I faced out some problems with this new version on FreeBSD 6.X and 7.X. Could you investigate what's happen on these two versions? And if it's doesn't work, could you re-work your patch to show the proper message that it's broken on these RELEASES?

On FreeBSD 6.X, I faced out a problem with devel/gvfs dependency.
On FreeBSD 7.X, It doesn't build, here is the log: http://regis.goodking.ca:8000/tb/errors/7-araujo/eiciel-0.9.8.log

Thanks.
